properties.remark: A MUDSLIDE HAS REDUCED HIGHWAY 299 AT ADIN PASS TO 1 LANE.
KDRV REPORTED OR 46 EASTBOUND LANE IS BLOCKED BY A LANDSLIDE AT MP 19 ON THE WAY TO THE OREGON CAVES NATIONAL MONUMENT. CREWS ARE EXPECTED TO HAVE IT CLEARED BY THURSDAY (1/12/17).
